summary: Verified all 5 user-reported issues are fixed. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 pages verified working correctly with proper empty states.

issues: HTML hydration warnings for table elements - minor React warning, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: Issue 1 - Audience: /api/brands/{brand_id}/influencers returns 404 (expected), frontend shows toast message gracefully
Issue 2 - Benchmark: Returns has_data flag, empty state 'Sem dados para benchmark' shown correctly, no fake 95th percentile
Issue 2 - Benchmark: Sector not showing 'default', RBI returns null when not calculated
Issue 3 - Brand Funnel: Empty state 'Nenhum dado de funil configurado' shown, no fake 10000/3000/1200 values
Issue 3 - Brand Funnel: All stages show 0 instead of estimated/mock data
Issue 4 - Brand Health: Funnel section shows 0 values, not fake data
Issue 5 - Pilar Valores: Progress shows 50% with valores only, 100% with valores + necessidades
Issue 5 - Pilar Valores: Cruzamentos NOT required for 100% completion
Admin cleanup endpoint includes estimated_funnel removal
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 issues have been properly fixed
Audience page handles 404 gracefully with toast message about integrations
Benchmark shows empty state with Portuguese message when no pillar data
Brand Funnel returns empty stages {} instead of fake estimated data
Brand Health correctly shows 0 values for funnel section
Pilar Valores progress calculation is 50/50 split (valores + necessidades), cruzamentos NOT included
seed_data_creation: Created test valores (Inovação) and necessidade (Praticidade) to verify progress calculation

issue_1_audience_influencers.details: Buscar Influenciadores button shows toast on 404 - 'Funcionalidade requer integração com redes sociais'
issue_1_audience_influencers.frontend_behavior: Shows empty state card when pillars not filled, button gracefully handles API 404

issue_2_benchmark_empty_state.details: Shows 'Sem dados para benchmark' with CTA to fill pillars when has_data=false

issue_3_brand_funnel_no_fake_data.details: Shows 'Nenhum dado de funil configurado' empty state, all stages show 0

issue_4_brand_health_empty_funnel.details: Funnel section shows 0 values, 'Saúde do Funil' shows 0

issue_5_pilar_valores_progress.details: Progress = 50% valores + 50% necessidades = 100%, cruzamentos NOT required
issue_5_pilar_valores_progress.calculation: calculateProgress() returns 50 for valores, 50 for necessidades, 0 for cruzamentos

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 user-reported issues verified fixed. Admin credentials work. Empty states show proper Portuguese messages. Progress calculation in Pilar Valores is 50/50 split between valores and necessidades (cruzamentos excluded from calculation). Use admin@labrand.com / LaBrand@2024! for testing.
